title: Italian Options Wired-Edge Red Velvet Ribbon, Luxury, Wide Christmas Ribbon, Wired Ribbons for Crafts, Gift Wrapping, Wreaths, Tree Decorations, Red, Gold Tinsel, 63 mm x 10 Metre Roll
features: WIRED-EDGE RIBBON: Available in single-face green, navy, or red velvet with a glitzy silver or gold tinsel edge, this luxurious wired ribbon provides maximum hold and versatile styling options for opulent crafts and gift wrapping.
PLUSH TEXTURE: Measuring 63 mm x 10 metres, this richly hued Christmas tree ribbon is thick, super-soft, and fray-resistant, with a luxurious texture and natural elegance.

VERSATILE APPLICATION: A must-have for your craft supplies, these wired velvet Christmas ribbons will elevate cosmetics, scented products, millinery, chocolates, gift wrapping, paper crafts, wreaths, floral displays, bouquets, and hampers.

SAFETY ASSURED: Add a sprinkle of magic to every gift and decoration this Christmas with our premium ribbons. REACH-compliant (SVHC-free) and OEKO-TEX Standard 100 certified, giving you peace of mind while making every celebration memorable.

ABOUT US: Founded in 1987, Italian Options is a family-run British company supplying premium craft supplies for over 38 years, including wedding favours, stationery, and decorations to help you craft, create, and celebrate life’s special moments.
description: Add a touch of premium festive charm to any craft project with our luxurious wired-edge velvet ribbon, available in red, navy, or green. Made from 100% velvet material, this Christmas ribbon is super soft and plush, with a glitzy tinsel-wired edging designed to provide maximum hold and increase your styling options, adding structure and elegance to your creations. This seasonal ribbon is durable and versatile, ideal for a wide range of applications — from creating handmade bows, decorating gifts, wreaths, and hampers to embellishing craft projects — making every celebration unforgettable. Our premium seasonal ribbons are REACH-compliant (SVHC-free) and OEKO-TEX Standard 100 certified, ensuring the highest safety and quality standards. Established in 1987, Italian Options is a family-run British company specialising in high-quality craft supplies and event decorations, helping you craft, create, and celebrate life’s special occasions. Perfect for home crafters, DIYers, and event planners. Each velvet ribbon measures 63 mm in width and is supplied on a 10-metre roll.
